heroHeadline: Structural Engineering & Home Design Built to Last
heroSubheadline: Practical, buildable solutions for residential construction remodels, new builds, and everything in between. Serving the Willamette Valley.
aboutText: Timber Ridge Engineering & Design (TREAD) is a McMinnville-based structural engineering and home design firm. Ben brings a hands-on, collaborative approach to every project — delivering designs that are structurally sound, cost-effective, and contractor-ready. He works directly with homeowners, contractors, and architects to make sure every detail translates from drawing to job site.
credentials: Licensed Professional Engineer, State of Oregon
serviceArea: McMinnville, Newberg, Yamhill County, and the greater Willamette Valley
